name: 4am-donato-dozzy
content:
// DJ OPUS - 4AM DONATO DOZZY
// Hypnotic. Underwater. Two or three sounds filling the spectrum.
// Less is more. Patience.
setcps(124/60/4)

let drift = slider(0.4, 0, 0.7, 0.01, "DRIFT")
let depth = slider(0.5, 0, 1, 0.01, "DEPTH")

// Kick - 808 softened into the room
let kick = s("bd").bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.75)
  .struct("x ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~  x ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~")
  .room(0.5)
  .size(0.7)

// Hat - blurred outward, long tails
let hat = s("hh").bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.18)
  .struct("~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~ ~  ~ x ~ ~ x ~ ~ x")
  .room(0.7)
  .size(0.8)
  .delay(0.3)
  .delaytime(3/16)
  .delayfeedback(0.4)
  .cutoff(perlin.range(1500, 4000).slow(32))

// Deep bass - one note, slow filter drift, never repeats
let bass = note("a1")
  .s("sawtooth")
  .cutoff(perlin.range(120, 800).slow(32))
  .resonance(8)
  .decay(0.4)
  .sustain(0.15)
  .gain(depth)
  .struct("x ~ x ~ ~ x ~ x  ~ x ~ ~ x ~ x ~")

// Sub - just weight
let sub = note("a0")
  .s("sine")
  .gain(0.4)
  .struct("x ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~  x ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~")
  .decay(0.8)
  .sustain(0.1)

// The wash - one long sawtooth drone, barely moving
let wash = note("[a2,e3]")
  .s("sawtooth")
  .cutoff(perlin.range(150, 600).slow(64))
  .resonance(3)
  .attack(4)
  .decay(6)
  .sustain(0.3)
  .release(4)
  .gain(drift)
  .room(0.95)
  .size(0.98)

stack(kick, hat, bass, sub, wash)
